strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience spanning Node.js/TypeScript, React, and multiple backend stacks
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent requirement
Strong testing/craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, founded testing workshops and a D test runner
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume or employment history
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older (robotic arms at Altom, 2016-2018)
Vitest not explicitly cited, though Jest-class testing expertise is implied

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin exposure

response.justification: Core competencies for this role are senior full-stack delivery (TS/Node + React), AI agent development, testing rigor, cloud/containers, and polyglot backend (Kotlin/Java). The candidate exceeds the 6+ year bar with 13+ years across web, mobile, and embedded; Optilyz (TS/AWS CDK/React/MongoDB) and RIDE (Node/TS/GraphQL with TDD/CI/CD) directly demonstrate the primary stack and engineering discipline. The re:cinq role explicitly cites MCP code generators and agentic workflows, which maps cleanly to the AI agent requirement. Docker/Kubernetes appear via GISCollective deployment, and MongoDB/MySQL/SQL cover the database requirement. Gaps are Nest.js (not mentioned anywhere) and current Kotlin work — Java experience exists but is dated. Vitest isn't named but Jest-equivalent testing expertise is well-evidenced. Strengths clearly outweigh the framework-specific gaps, which are learnable for a senior of this caliber.
